title: Forward Financing Secures Another $525 Million to Support Small Businesses
message_html: Forward Financing Secures Another $525 Million to Support Small Businesses ...
snippet: Forward Financing, a provider of capital to small businesses across the United States, secured $525 million of new financing that brings the company’s total committed funding capacity to nearly $700 million.
